overview.description: The Franklin Municipal High Yield ETF (FTMH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF that provides exposure to high-yield US municipal bonds with maturities of three years or longer. FTMH was launched on Oct 27, 2025 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
